title: glochidion benguetense
intro: Glochidion benguetense is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly known as Benguet philodendron or Benguet tree. It is native to the Philippines and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties, offering benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, or used as a topical application to harness its medicinal benefits.
